revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Decade by country category header]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Decade by country category header]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

{{Distinguish|Template:Decade in country category}}{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^%d*0s by country$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:Decade by country category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form "YYY0s by country", where YYY0s is a 4-digit decade}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{Portal|History|Geography|{{FindYDCportal|{{Title decade}}s}}|{{#ifexpr: {{Title decade}} > 1990 | {{#ifexpr: {{Title decade}} <= {{CURRENTDECADE}} | Current events }} }}}}{{Category explanation|the decade '''[[{{Decade link|{{Title decade}}}}]]''' by '''[[country]]'''}} {{Navseasoncats}} {{Category see also if exists|{{Title decade}}s by city|{{Title decade}}s by continent}} [[Category:{{Title decade}}s|.Country]] [[Category:{{Century name from title decade|dash}} decades by country|{{Title decade}}s]] {{#ifexpr: {{Title decade}} >= 1950|[[Category:Contemporary history by country{{!}}{{Title decade}}s]]}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:Decade by country category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form "YYY0s by country", where YYY0s is a 4-digit decade}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}{{Automatic category TOC}}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Distinguish|Template:Decade in country category}}{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^%d*0s by country$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:Decade by country category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form "YYY0s by country", where YYY0s is a 4-digit decade}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{Portal|History|Geography|{{FindYDCportal|{{Title decade}}s}}|{{#ifexpr: {{Title decade}} > 1990 | {{#ifexpr: {{Title decade}} <= {{CURRENTDECADE}} | Current events }} }}}}{{Category explanation|the decade '''[[{{Decade link|{{Title decade}}}}]]''' by '''[[country]]'''}} {{Navseasoncats}} {{Category see also if exists|{{Title decade}}s by city|{{Title decade}}s by continent}} [[Category:{{Title decade}}s|.Country]] [[Category:{{Century name from title decade|dash}} decades by country|{{Title decade}}s]] {{#ifexpr: {{Title decade}} >= 1950|[[Category:Contemporary history by country{{!}}{{Title decade}}s]]}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:Decade by country category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form "YYY0s by country", where YYY0s is a 4-digit decade}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}{{Automatic category TOC}}{{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Distinguish|Template:Decade in country category}}{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^%d*0s by country$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:Decade by country category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form "YYY0s by country", where YYY0s is a 4-digit decade}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{Portal|History|Geography|{{FindYDCportal|{{Title decade}}s}}|{{#ifexpr: {{Title decade}} > 1990 | {{#ifexpr: {{Title decade}} <= {{CURRENTDECADE}} | Current events }} }}}}{{Category explanation|the decade '''[[{{Decade link|{{Title decade}}}}]]''' by '''[[country]]'''}} {{Navseasoncats}} {{Category see also if exists|{{Title decade}}s by city|{{Title decade}}s by continent}} [[Category:{{Title decade}}s|.Country]] [[Category:{{Century name from title decade|dash}} decades by country|{{Title decade}}s]] {{#ifexpr: {{Title decade}} >= 1950|[[Category:Contemporary history by country{{!}}{{Title decade}}s]]}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:Decade by country category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form "YYY0s by country", where YYY0s is a 4-digit decade}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}{{Automatic category TOC}}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Distinguish|Template:Decade in country category}}{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^%d*0s by country$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:Decade by country category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form "YYY0s by country", where YYY0s is a 4-digit decade}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{Portal|History|Geography|{{FindYDCportal|{{Title decade}}s}}|{{#ifexpr: {{Title decade}} > 1990 | {{#ifexpr: {{Title decade}} <= {{CURRENTDECADE}} | Current events }} }}}}{{Category explanation|the decade '''[[{{Decade link|{{Title decade}}}}]]''' by '''[[country]]'''}} {{Navseasoncats}} {{Category see also if exists|{{Title decade}}s by city|{{Title decade}}s by continent}} [[Category:{{Title decade}}s|.Country]] [[Category:{{Century name from title decade|dash}} decades by country|{{Title decade}}s]] {{#ifexpr: {{Title decade}} >= 1950|[[Category:Contemporary history by country{{!}}{{Title decade}}s]]}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:Decade by country category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form "YYY0s by country", where YYY0s is a 4-digit decade}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}{{Automatic category TOC}}{{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{Distinguish|Template:Decade in country category}}{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^%d*0s by country$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:Decade by country category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form "YYY0s by country", where YYY0s is a 4-digit decade}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{Portal|History|Geography|{{FindYDCportal|{{Title decade}}s}}|{{#ifexpr: {{Title decade}} > 1990 | {{#ifexpr: {{Title decade}} <= {{CURRENTDECADE}} | Current events }} }}}}{{Category explanation|the decade '''[[{{Decade link|{{Title decade}}}}]]''' by '''[[country]]'''}} {{Navseasoncats}} {{Category see also if exists|{{Title decade}}s by city|{{Title decade}}s by continent}} [[Category:{{Title decade}}s|.Country]] [[Category:{{Century name from title decade|dash}} decades by country|{{Title decade}}s]] {{#ifexpr: {{Title decade}} >= 1950|[[Category:Contemporary history by country{{!}}{{Title decade}}s]]}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:Decade by country category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form "YYY0s by country", where YYY0s is a 4-digit decade}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}{{Automatic category TOC}}{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 6 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23388260132|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Distinguish|Template:Decade in country category}}{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^%d*0s by country$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:Decade by country category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form "YYY0s by country", where YYY0s is a 4-digit decade}}|{{Portal|History|Geography|{{FindYDCportal|{{Title decade}}s}}|{{#ifexpr: {{Title decade}} > 1990 | {{#ifexpr: {{Title decade}} <= {{CURRENTDECADE}} | Current events }} }}}}{{Category explanation|the decade '''[[{{Decade link|{{Title decade}}}}]]''' by '''[[country]]'''}} {{Navseasoncats}} {{Category see also if exists|{{Title decade}}s by city|{{Title decade}}s by continent}} {{#ifexpr: {{Title decade}} >= 1950|}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:Decade by country category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form "YYY0s by country", where YYY0s is a 4-digit decade}}}}{{Automatic category TOC}}{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]] [[Category:{{Title decade}}s|.Country]] [[Category:{{Century name from title decade|dash}} decades by country|{{Title decade}}s]] [[Category:Contemporary history by country{{!}}{{Title decade}}s]] [[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Distinguish|Template:Decade in country category}}{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^%d*0s by country$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:Decade by country category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form "YYY0s by country", where YYY0s is a 4-digit decade}}|{{Portal|History|Geography|{{FindYDCportal|{{Title decade}}s}}|{{#ifexpr: {{Title decade}} > 1990 | {{#ifexpr: {{Title decade}} <= {{CURRENTDECADE}} | Current events }} }}}}{{Category explanation|the decade '''[[{{Decade link|{{Title decade}}}}]]''' by '''[[country]]'''}} {{Navseasoncats}} {{Category see also if exists|{{Title decade}}s by city|{{Title decade}}s by continent}} {{#ifexpr: {{Title decade}} >= 1950|}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:Decade by country category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form "YYY0s by country", where YYY0s is a 4-digit decade}}}}{{Automatic category TOC}}{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]] [[Category:{{Title decade}}s|.Country]] [[Category:{{Century name from title decade|dash}} decades by country|{{Title decade}}s]] [[Category:Contemporary history by country{{!}}{{Title decade}}s]] [[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Decade_by_country_category_header here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Distinguish|Template:Decade in country category}}{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^%d*0s by country$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:Decade by country category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form "YYY0s by country", where YYY0s is a 4-digit decade}}|{{Portal|History|Geography|{{FindYDCportal|{{Title decade}}s}}|{{#ifexpr: {{Title decade}} > 1990 | {{#ifexpr: {{Title decade}} <= {{CURRENTDECADE}} | Current events }} }}}}{{Category explanation|the decade '''[[{{Decade link|{{Title decade}}}}]]''' by '''[[country]]'''}} {{Navseasoncats}} {{Category see also if exists|{{Title decade}}s by city|{{Title decade}}s by continent}} {{#ifexpr: {{Title decade}} >= 1950|}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:Decade by country category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form "YYY0s by country", where YYY0s is a 4-digit decade}}}}{{Automatic category TOC}}{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]] [[Category:{{Title decade}}s|.Country]] [[Category:{{Century name from title decade|dash}} decades by country|{{Title decade}}s]] [[Category:Contemporary history by country{{!}}{{Title decade}}s]] [[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Distinguish|Template:Decade in country category}}{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^%d*0s by country$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:Decade by country category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form "YYY0s by country", where YYY0s is a 4-digit decade}}|{{Portal|History|Geography|{{FindYDCportal|{{Title decade}}s}}|{{#ifexpr: {{Title decade}} > 1990 | {{#ifexpr: {{Title decade}} <= {{CURRENTDECADE}} | Current events }} }}}}{{Category explanation|the decade '''[[{{Decade link|{{Title decade}}}}]]''' by '''[[country]]'''}} {{Navseasoncats}} {{Category see also if exists|{{Title decade}}s by city|{{Title decade}}s by continent}} {{#ifexpr: {{Title decade}} >= 1950|}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:Decade by country category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form "YYY0s by country", where YYY0s is a 4-digit decade}}}}{{Automatic category TOC}}{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]] [[Category:{{Title decade}}s|.Country]] [[Category:{{Century name from title decade|dash}} decades by country|{{Title decade}}s]] [[Category:Contemporary history by country{{!}}{{Title decade}}s]] [[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
